title: My Son Stole My Home And Dumped Me In A Facility. So I Accepted His RV And Now I Live In It.
description: My son and his wife promised to care for me during a health crisis, then sold my paid‑off $210,000 condo and placed me in a cheap state facility to buy a luxury RV. I documented everything, sued, and won a $250,000 elder exploitation judgment, accepting their RV as partial payment. Now I live in it full‑time, crisscrossing America and blogging about reclaiming my golden years. #ElderExploitation #RVLife #RevengeStory
thumb_text: THEY STOLE MY HOME, NOW I LIVE IN THEIR RV
pinned_comment: If your adult son and his wife sold your $210,000 condo, dumped you in a facility, and bought an RV with the money, would you have accepted that RV as partial payment? Tell me your story in the comments.

thumb_lines.text: I DOCUMENTED THEIR NEGLECT AND SUED TO REGAIN MY ESTATE
